content.text:
Based on the visual inspection of the molecule, I can clearly identify the neighbor atoms of atom index 9 (C:9):

1. C:8 (carbon) - connected to the left
2. C:10 (carbon) - connected to the right  
3. H:27 (hydrogen) - connected upward

These are the three atoms covalently bonded to atom C:9.

The geomconf_index for this molecule is 1496, as indicated by the filename "geomconf_1496.xyz".

Therefore, the neighbor atoms of atom 9 (C) are:
- Atom index 8 (C)
- Atom index 10 (C)
- Atom index 27 (H)

Geomconf_index: 1496

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 9, whose element should be C. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
